message:
fix(dashboard): detect Agent Mail via archive fallback when HTTP unavailable

- Add HasArchive() and HasArchiveForProject() functions to agentmail client
- Add MailAvailable and MailArchiveFound fields to TickerData
- Update ticker display to show "detected" when archive exists but HTTP fails
- Agent Mail accessed via MCP stdio protocol doesn't expose HTTP endpoint
- This fixes the dashboard showing "offline" when Mail is actually available

Closes: bd-1hev

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
